query:
SELECT 
  p.id, p.name,
  pc.id as category_id, pc.name as category_name
FROM positions p
LEFT JOIN position_categories pc ON p.id = pc.positionId
WHERE p.id IN (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8)
ORDER BY p.id, pc.id
LIMIT 10;
